_comment: Example golden: paired with fix_a1b2c3d4, scenario=ticket-summary
_note: The golden provides two kinds of signals: (1) structured expected fields, used by rule.json_schema and rule.regex; (2) a natural-language summary, used by semantic.embedding and judge.llm.

expected_structured.summary: Multiple users have had VPN authentication failures ('authentication failed') since 10 AM; a server-side authentication issue is suspected; the symptom is independent of the endpoint device.
next_actions: Verify the health of the VPN gateway / authentication services (RADIUS/AD)
Ask the user for the client version and account information
Check whether a change window occurred around 10:00

expected_summary_nl: Multiple users have had VPN authentication failures since 10:00 AM; endpoint and network have been cross-checked and ruled out; recommend prioritizing the VPN gateway and the authentication backend.

schema_check._inline_defs_note: In real projects this can be externalized; this field illustrates the schema-validation entry point
